positive: Minimalist symmetrical composition featuring a stylized celestial arrangement: a crescent moon cradling a constellation map formed by elegant, glowing geometric lines and eight small, distant stars. Below the constellation, a stylized mountain range silhouette transitions into a circular banner containing the phrase 'Adventure Awaits' in a clean, serif, retro-futuristic font. The color palette should be deep indigo, luminous gold, and matte black. Focus on crisp, clean lines, high contrast, and a distinct silhouette quality perfect for screen printing on apparel. Flat graphic design aesthetic, vector illustration style, perfect central placement, symmetrical composition, golden hour glow effect, highly detailed stardust accents.
